title: David II of Trebizond becomes emperor of Trebizond
fact: David Megas Komnenos was the last Emperor of Trebizond from 1460 to 1461.

title: Alexios III of Trebizond becomes emperor of Trebizond
fact: Alexios III Megas Komnenos, or Alexius III, was Emperor of Trebizond from December 1349 until his death.

title: John IV of Trebizond becomes emperor of Trebizond
fact: John IV Megas Komnenos was Emperor of Trebizond from 1429 until his death.

title: Alexios IV of Trebizond becomes emperor of Trebizond
fact: Alexios IV Megas Komnenos or Alexius IV, Emperor of Trebizond from 5 March 1417 to 26 April 1429.

title: John II of Trebizond becomes emperor of Trebizond
fact: John II Megas Komnenos was Emperor of Trebizond from June 1280 to his death in 1297.

title: Manuel I of Trebizond becomes emperor of Trebizond
fact: Manuel I Megas Komnenos was the Emperor of Trebizond from 1238 until his death.
